mfrc522_setup.tooltip: Initialize the MFRC522 RFID reader and set the I2C address and pins

mfrc522_is_new_card_present.tooltip: Detect if a new RFID card is approaching

mfrc522_read_card_serial.tooltip: Read the unique serial number of an RFID card

mfrc522_read_uid.tooltip: Get the UID string of the RFID card

mfrc522_when_card_detected.tooltip: Event triggered when an RFID card is detected

mfrc522_authenticate.message0: RFID %1 Authentication Sector %2 Key Type %3 Key %4
mfrc522_authenticate.tooltip: Authenticate the specified sector of the RFID card

mfrc522_read_block.tooltip: Read the specified block of data into an array

mfrc522_write_block.tooltip: Write data to the specified block

mfrc522_get_data_string.tooltip: Convert RFID data array to hexadecimal string format (eg: 48 65 6c 6c 6f)
